expectations.text: Gate A fired: asked scoping questions before producing a voice profile
expectations.evidence: Response asks three scoping questions and explicitly states it will 'build you a full voice profile' only after receiving answers — no profile is produced.

expectations.text: Asked about audience, the 3 words the brand should/shouldn't feel like, and competitors
expectations.evidence: Q1 asks about core audience, Q2 asks what people should 'feel' after reading brand content, Q3 asks about alternatives and how to 'sound different from them'.

expectations.text: Did not invent a brand voice from nothing
expectations.evidence: Response concludes 'Once I have these, I'll build you a full voice profile' — no brand voice is invented without inputs.
